title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in background, phone actively used
scenario: Soak test to detect memory leaks or crashes after prolonged background use with headset connected and phone actively used
steps: Install and launch the app, pair the headset, then navigate to the Home Screen.
Put the app in the background and play music from YouTube or Spotify.
After several hours (ideally overnight or when the phone can be idle for multiple hours), check that the app is still running and usable as expected.
expected: App remains running without crashes or memory leaks, and is fully usable after prolonged background use with headset connected.
